corrections.reason: Hunter's reasoning quoted 'pris conscience de la nécessité d'informer... dans les meilleurs délais' -- this sentence does not appear in the corpus body. The actual text is only an apology for a past incident plus the inspection restating its expectations; no future commitment is stated by the exploitant. Empty 'Demande à formuler' section confirms the conformity/closure heuristic. Also corrected mechanisms (+M08_CONFORMITE), gravity (G2->G1), stage (S04_VERIFICATION->S06_CLOTURE).
No outstanding demand in this record; missed multi-label for the closure signal (M08).
No NC assessed in this record's body -- it is an apology plus a reminder, not a documentary or physical non-conformity.
No further action requested; the fiche closes the loop on the June 2022 incident.
Systematic pattern (b): the only demand in constats_body ('L'inspection demande à l'exploitant de préciser si des travaux sont toujours prévus') carries no numeric/calendar deadline.

Medium-confidence record re-audited. Body discusses operating capacity relative to the authorized regime and a pending arrêté complémentaire updating the classification -- missed M17_CLASSIFICATION multi-label.
Systematic pattern (b): 'contrôle d'étanchéité devra être réalisé avant le redémarrage' is conditional on a future event, not a calendar deadline. No numeric delay stated.
Re-read corpus: M08_CONFORMITE / G1 / R13_NEUTRE_CONFORME are well supported by the text (zones ATEX identified, no electrical installations in retentions). No error found; confidence raised.

Missed multi-label: body explicitly discusses a porter-à-connaissance requesting a VLE increase that the inspection ruled inadmissible ('La demande n'est pas recevable') -- M09_PAC applies alongside M08.
Systematic pattern (b): the demand ('un contrôle d'étanchéité doit être réalisé avant redémarrage du digesteur 095') is conditional on the restart event, not a numeric/calendar deadline.

Systematic pattern (b): the observation only reiterates the existing regulatory 30-day transmission rule ('il est demandé que l'exploitant respecte les délais...') -- no new corrective deadline is imposed.
Systematic pattern (b): 'il est demandé que l'exploitant transmette le rapport' carries no deadline.
Systematic pattern (b): both demands ('fournit l'analyse...', 'fournit un calendrier...') carry no numeric deadline.
Systematic pattern (b): the demand to transmit investigation results/action plan carries no numeric deadline.
Systematic pattern (b): the labeling demand carries no numeric deadline.
Systematic pattern (b): the demand to describe the spill origin and justify cleanup carries no numeric deadline.
Systematic pattern (b): the demand to conduct the GNC zone initial visit and transmit the report carries no numeric deadline.
Systematic pattern (b): the demand to transmit proof of no leak and notify end of repairs carries no numeric deadline.

Body states '3 observations anciennes subsistent dans le dernier rapport' -- the same anomalies persist unresolved across the Dec-2021 and Nov-2022 verification reports, which is stagnation, not a first occurrence.

Body explicitly states the écart 'avait déjà été notifié lors de l'inspection précédente du 19 janvier 2021' and calls the écart type 'récurrent' -- same unresolved NC across inspections, matching T4_STAGNATION more precisely than generic T2_SUIVI.
Systematic pattern (c): body states 'A défaut, une astreinte pourrait également être proposée au Préfet de Gironde sur ce point' -- a conditional threat that Hunter missed.

Systematic pattern (c): body states 'A défaut, des suites administratives pourront être proposées à Madame la préfète (astreinte journalière, amende administratives...)' -- a conditional threat that Hunter missed.

error_patterns: Audit scope: both medium-confidence records re-read against corpus (0 low-confidence records in this batch); 20 randomly sampled high-confidence records re-read against corpus; full-batch code-validity pass (0 violations, Hunter output was clean on that axis); full-batch scan for the three known systematic Hunter patterns. (a) R10_TENSION misuse: not applicable -- Hunter used R10_TENSION zero times in this batch. (b) m_DELAI modifier applied without a numeric/calendar deadline in constats_body: this was the dominant error type, found in 11 of the 75 records carrying m_DELAI (~15%). Recurring sub-patterns: conditional phrasing ('avant le redémarrage', 'dès l'achèvement des travaux') mistaken for a deadline, and reminders of a pre-existing regulatory delay (e.g. the standing 30-day GIDAF transmission rule) mistaken for a newly imposed corrective delay. Spelled-out deadlines ('sous un mois', 'sous un délai de trois mois', 'dans un délai maximal d'un an') were correctly recognized by Hunter and are NOT flagged as errors. (c) m_MENACE under-application: found 2 missed instances, both following the same shape -- an MED already active (M04), a new corrective delay set, and an explicit 'A défaut, [astreinte/suites administratives] pourraient être proposées' clause that Hunter did not tag. One hallucinated quote was also found (R02_PROMESSE justified by a sentence absent from the corpus) -- flagged as a distinct, non-systematic error. Two missed multi-label mechanisms (M17_CLASSIFICATION, M09_PAC) were found in thin/short records where a secondary administrative dimension was present alongside the dominant M08_CONFORMITE call. No false-M08, false-M14, wrong-gravity-from-physical-NC, or over-aggressive-M17 errors were found in the audited sample.
verdict: Hunter output for batch 74 is solid on code validity (0 violations across all 130 records) and on the dominant M08/M14 conformity-vs-NC calls (0 errors found in 20 sampled high-confidence records on that axis). The recurring weakness is m_DELAI over-application without a genuine numeric deadline in the text (11 corrections), consistent with the known systematic pattern; m_MENACE remains slightly under-applied (2 misses) but far less than m_DELAI over-application. Overall quality: good, with a mechanical, easily-correctable bias on the delay modifier.
